title: Palace of Versailles is completed
subtitle: Palace in Versailles, France and location of the Museum of the History of France
fact: The Palace of Versailles is a former royal residence commissioned by King Louis XIV located in Versailles, about 18 kilometres (11 mi) west of the city centre of Paris, in the Yvelines department of Île-de-France region in France.

title: Louvre Museum opens
subtitle: Art and archeology museum in Paris, France
fact: The Louvre, or the Louvre Museum, is a national art museum in Paris, France.
